title: LCompat
body:
Lightman's Compatibility is a cross-mod compatibility mod that adds Compatibilities between [Lightman's Currency](https://modrinth.com/mod/lightmans-currency) and various other mods.


The currently available compatibilities are:

- Waystones: Monetary Warping Costs
- FTB Chunks: Land Purchasing & Renting Shop

Join the discord for updates on development!

[![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/GJxljbf.png)](https://discord.gg/cxbm4KnQk6)
